column_description: ID number identifying the unique number of the coach
the period of the time coaching this team
the number of games won in the post-season (playoffs) games
value_description:
0: no wins

commonsense evidence:

If the team's post-season wins and losses are all zero, it implies that the team did not participate in the post-season (playoffs) that year.

column_description: the number of games lost in the post-season (playoffs) games
value_description:
0: win all the games

commonsense evidence:

If the team's post-season wins and losses are all zero, it implies that the team did not participate in the post-season (playoffs) that year.
